user.title: Set up SmartThings Find
user.description: Start SmartThings Find login. You will be asked to scan a QR code.

reauth_confirm.title: Re-authentication required
reauth_confirm.description: Your SmartThings Find session expired. Continue to re-authenticate.

finish.title: Finish
finish.description: If an error occurs, it will be shown below.

error.login_stage_one_failed: Failed to start login. Try again.
error.login_stage_two_failed: Login confirmation failed or timed out. Try again.

init.title: Options
init.description: Configure update interval and active mode.
